name: Ketamine
description: I-anesthetic ye-dissociative enikezela i-analgesia, i-sedation, kunye ne-amnesia ngelixa igcina i-reflexes yomoya kunye nokuzinza kwe-hemodynamic. I-analgesic ekhethwayo kwi-TCCC -- igcina i-BP ngokungafaniyo ne-opioids. Ikwasetyenziselwa inkqubo yokuthoba kunye ne-RSI.
dose: I-Analgesia: 0.1-0.3 mg / kg IV / IO (i-slow push) | 0.5 mg / kg IM. Inkqubo ye-sedation: 1-2 mg / kg IV | 4-6 mg / kg IM. I-RSI induction: 1-2 mg / kg IV.
warnings: Iimpendulo eziphuthumayo (i-delirium / hallucinations) -- nciphisa nge-midazolam 1-2mg IV ukuba ikhona.
ILaryngospasm inqabile kodwa inokwenzeka -- gcina i-BVM ikhona.

pediatric.dose: I-Analgesia: 0.5 mg / kg IV. Inkqubo ye-sedation: 1-2 mg / kg IV | 4-5 mg / kg IM.
pediatric.note: Ufundwe kakuhle kwi-pediatrics. Ikhethwa kwiinkqubo ezibuhlungu.

obstetric.note: Ikhuselekile kwi-analgesia kamama kwiidosi eziphantsi. Inokubangela ukudakumba kokuphefumla komntwana osandul' ukusandul' ukuphefumla kwiidosi eziphezulu ukuba zinikezelwe kufutshane nexesha lokubeleka.

source: JTS CPG: Acute Pain Management / TCCC Guidelines
